presets.name: Four on the Floor
presets.description: Classic club groove with straight 8th hats and polymetric open hat

presets.name: Polymetric Drift
presets.description: Prime-number cycles (3, 5, 7, 11) creating evolving phase patterns

presets.name: Sparse Pulse
presets.description: Minimal, spacious groove with wide spacing and gentle ghost notes

presets.name: Breakbeat
presets.description: Syncopated kick with punchy snare, fast hats and ghost toms

presets.name: Latin Feel
presets.description: Clave-inspired pattern with conga, shaker and cowbell ornaments

presets.name: Afro-House Phrases
presets.description: Offset phrase loops — shaker continuous, conga and djembe breathe on staggered cycles

presets.name: Reich Phasing
presets.description: Two identical patterns gradually phase apart creating emergent resultant rhythms

presets.name: Kotekan Interlock
presets.description: Balinese interlocking pair — polos and sangsih fill each other's gaps

presets.name: Pocket Groove
presets.description: J Dilla-style micro-timing — kick pushes late, snare pulls early, gentle mutation

presets.name: Afrobeat 12/8
presets.description: Compound-time groove with timeline bell pattern, four-on-the-floor kick and conga ghosts

presets.name: Balkan Aksak
presets.description: 7/8 aksak [2+2+3] additive cells — davul, rim, zurna and darbuka

presets.name: Bossa Nova
presets.description: Clave timeline with ginga micro-timing — surdo, tamborim, agogo and pandeiro

presets.name: Carnatic Tala
presets.description: Adi tala [4+2+2] additive cells — mridangam, ghatam and kanjira

presets.name: IDM Glitch
presets.description: Irregular additive cells with heavy mutation and erratic micro-timing offsets

presets.name: Sub-Saharan: Agbekor
presets.description: Ewe-inspired polymetric ensemble — gankogui bell timeline, kidi, sogo and lead drum

presets.name: Gamelan: Colotomic
presets.description: Javanese colotomic nesting — ketuk, kempul, kenong and gong ageng at 4:8:16:32 ratios

presets.name: Polymetric Foundation
presets.description: Two-lane polymetric demonstration — 12-step bell against 7-step counter pattern

presets.name: Ewe Polymetric Ensemble
presets.description: Gankogui bell timeline with support, responding, and interlocking lead drums

presets.name: Manding Djembe
presets.description: Three-lane djembe ensemble — dunun, sangban, and lead sharing an 8-step cycle

presets.name: Cuban Son Montuno
presets.description: Clave matrix with cascara, tumbao bass, conga, and shaker layers

presets.name: Afrobeat Lagos
presets.description: Extended Afrobeat groove — bell timeline with staggered phrase gating on snare, shaker, and conga

presets.name: Balinese Kotekan
presets.description: Polos and sangsih interlocking with jegogan bass and reyong accents

presets.name: Javanese Colotomic
presets.description: Nested colotomic hierarchy — ketuk, kempul, kenong, and gong at 4:8:16:32

presets.name: Tintal Groove
presets.description: Hindustani 16-beat cycle with sam, theka, dugun, and tigun layakari layers

presets.name: Rupak Tal
presets.description: 7-beat Hindustani cycle — sam marker, theka, and counter rhythm

presets.name: Rachenitsa 7/8
presets.description: Bulgarian rachenitsa — tupan, kaval, and gadulka in seven-beat cycle

presets.name: Kopanitsa 11/8
presets.description: Fast Bulgarian kopanitsa — kick, snare, hat, and bell in eleven-beat cycle

presets.name: Reich Phase Process
presets.description: Gradual phase-shifting — two identical 12-step patterns drifting apart

presets.name: Riley Layered Entry
presets.description: Staggered voice entries with phrase gating — foundation plus four gated layers

presets.name: Nancarrow Tempi
presets.description: Independent tempo multipliers — anchor, double-time, half-time, and hemiola voices

presets.name: Minimal Techno
presets.description: Four-on-the-floor kick with polymetric 7-step ghost percussion and sparse clap

presets.name: Deep House
presets.description: Swung house groove — open hat, shaker, and rim with moderate swing and humanize

presets.name: Samba Batucada
presets.description: Full batucada ensemble — surdo, tamborim, agogo, repinique, and caixa

presets.name: Bossa Nova Trio
presets.description: Intimate bossa — E(5,16) bass, ride cymbal, and ghost brush

presets.name: Classic Funk
presets.description: JB-style pocket — kick pushes late, snare pulls early, dense ghost layer

presets.name: Neo-Soul Pocket
presets.description: Loose, warm groove with heavy humanize and polymetric 12-step rim click

presets.name: Jazz Bop Ride
presets.description: Bop timekeeping — ride and hi-hat foot with mutating kick and snare comp

presets.name: Elvin Jones Cascade
presets.description: Polyrhythmic cascade — 4, 3, 5, and 7-step cycles with swing and mutation

presets.name: Jungle Break
presets.description: Syncopated chopped break at 170 — dense ghost layer with rolling undertow

presets.name: Liquid Drum and Bass
presets.description: Clean two-step kick with steady hat and warm ride cymbal wash

presets.name: Afro-Electronic Fusion
presets.description: Cuban clave meets techno kick and gamelan-inspired kotekan shimmer

presets.name: Balkan Funk
presets.description: 7/8 aksak with funk ghost notes and micro-timing on the hi-hat

presets.name: Compositional Arc
presets.description: Six-lane layered build — three continuous lanes plus three gated ornamental voices
